task_completion.description: Open the Liverpool Cancer iChart application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Liverpool Cancer iChart app interface is visible on the screen.
Sildenafil is searched for and selected in the comedication list within the app.

task_completion.description: View the interaction between Sildenafil and Enzalutamide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the interaction result and traffic-light color for Sildenafil and Enzalutamide.

task_completion.description: View the interaction between Sildenafil and Imatinib.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the interaction result and traffic-light color for Sildenafil and Imatinib.

task_completion.description: Open a text editor to create the report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor app is open, showing a file being edited and saved as 'sildenafil_comparison.txt' in the /sdcard/ directory.

task_completion.description: Document the interaction color for Enzalutamide in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains the line 'Enzalutamide: [Color]' where [Color] is a specific traffic-light color (e.g., Red, Amber, Yellow, Green, Grey).

task_completion.description: Document the interaction color for Imatinib in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains the line 'Imatinib: [Color]' where [Color] is a specific traffic-light color.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent navigating the actual iChart app to view the drug interactions, rather than hallucinating the answers from external knowledge.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI text editor to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is written in a graphical text editor application, not generated using terminal commands like 'echo'.

integrity.description: The agent replaced the placeholder with actual colors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file shows actual colors instead of the literal string '[Color]' copied directly from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified drugs: Enzalutamide, Imatinib, and Sildenafil. The Liverpool Cancer iChart app uses a traffic-light system: red, amber, yellow, green, and grey. Note that 'amber' may sometimes be referred to as 'orange' in metadata; both 'amber' and 'orange' are acceptable for the amber category.
